steps: Day 1: Whole mouse brain (2 years old, male) was fixed overnight in 4%PFA.
Day 2: Brain was washed 3x 5' in PBS + 4% Sucrose
Day2: Brain was incubated overnight in PBS + 30% Sucrose
Day3: Brain was embedded into optimal cutting medium (OCT)
Day3: Brain was cut with a cryostat in 10um thick sections and stored at -80C
Slides with brain tissue sections were thawed 00:15:00 Room temperature
Add slides to glass coplin Jar.
Wash 3x 00:10:00 in PEMTx
Move slides to plastic coplin jar for antigen retrieval
Perform antigen retrieval 00:15:00 85 °C
Let plastic coplin jar cool down to room temperature 00:20:00
Place slides back in original glass complin jar
Wash 2x 00:10:00 in PEMTx
Place slides horizontally in box humidified with MQ. Use hydrophobic pen to outline tissue sections.
Add blocking buffer to the slides and incubate 01:00:00
Add antibody solution (blocking buffer + 1:100 LBP110 + 1:100 p62) and incubate Overnight 4 °C
Wash slides 4x 00:15:00
Incubate with secondary antibody solution in humidified box (PEMTx + 2% BSA + 1:500 secondary antibodies + 1:1000 DAPI) for 01:00:00
Place slides back in coplin jar (keep in dark)
Wash 3x 00:10:00 in PEMTx
Wash 2x 00:07:00 in PEM
Mount slides using Prolong Gold mounting medium and store at 4 °C
creator: Dennis de Bakker
